fullArticle:
DK Metcalf has played 7 seasons for the Seahawks and Steelers. He has had 497 catches for 7,174 yards and has scored 55 touchdowns. He was selected to play in 2 Pro Bowls.

Washington Commanders are retiring Hall of Famer John Riggins' No. 44 on Nov. 8

Adam Vinatieri will celebrate on the field in Indianapolis again as Colts' Ring of Honor member

Former Dallas Cowboys defensive end Kneeland had early stage CTE at time of death

Cornerback Rasul Douglas agrees to a 1-year contract with the Commanders, AP source says

Teammates of Travis Kelce and others around sports attend his wedding to Taylor Swift...
